body.raw: {"title":"Event-storming workshops","description":"Facilitate bounded context discovery with cross-functional teams.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Data ownership & event schema registry","description":"Define golden sources; implement a schema registry for events.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"OAuth2/JWT for service-to-service calls","description":"Centralize identity; propagate claims securely across services.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Artifact repository & SBOM generation","description":"Store immutable artifacts and publish SBOM for compliance.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Strangler pattern implementation (blue/green)","description":"Incrementally route traffic to the new services with safety nets.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Saga orchestration POC","description":"Demonstrate eventual consistency across multi-service transactions.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Observability SLOs post-migration","description":"Recalibrate alert thresholds and update runbooks for SRE.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Post-go-live monitoring & incident review","description":"SLO tracking, runbook updates, and RCA for early incidents.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Base images with toolchains","description":"Pre-bake JDK, Node, Python; add security patches.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Distributed tracing & log aggregation (OTel)","description":"Deploy collectors and dashboards for latency/error budgets.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"CDC patterns & outbox/inbox relay","description":"Ensure reliable event publication and data synchronization.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Release readiness & rollback drills","description":"Tabletop exercises and automated rollback validation.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Map skills matrix by role","description":"Identify core and elective skills by job family.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Draft OpenAPI contracts & versioning","description":"Baseline schemas; choose versioning strategy & deprecation policy.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Build/test pipelines with caching & matrices","description":"Introduce matrix builds, cache dependencies, and parallel tests.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Read models & caching strategy","description":"Optimize query paths with denormalized views and caches.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Canary rollout & metrics guardrails","description":"Automate progressive delivery with rollback conditions.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Service discovery & config management","description":"Implement dynamic discovery and central config (per env).","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Vault provider integration POC","description":"Evaluate tokenization latency and SLA adherence.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Evaluate Playwright vs Cypress","description":"Reliability, flake rate, and cross-browser support benchmarking.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Shard suites & aggregate dashboards","description":"Distribute tests across workers; Grafana dashboards for trends.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Axe-core integration and contrast checks","description":"Baseline a11y compliance and block regressions in CI.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Refactor brittle locators to test-ids","description":"Replace xpath/css tied to layout with resilient data-testids.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Test data seeding for parallel envs","description":"Scripted factory seeds supporting isolated parallel test runs.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Accessibility ruleset & CI gate > AA WCAG","description":"Block PRs on severe a11y violations (contrast/labels/landmarks).","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"JMeter/Gatling scenarios & SLAs","description":"User journey workloads; publish baseline SLAs in Confluence.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Define critical smoke scenarios per app","description":"Identify top 10 flows per product for release qualification.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Reusable pipelines for build/test/deploy","description":"Templates with approvals, gates, and artifact promotions.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Screenshot/video artifacts & trace viewer","description":"Collect media on failures and enable trace-based debugging.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Flake quarantine & auto-ticketing","description":"Isolate flaky specs; open JIRA with logs/trace on failure.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Test prioritization with historical failure data","description":"Run risky specs first; shorten feedback cycle on PRs.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Visual regression baselines per theme/locale","description":"Baseline screenshots for primary UIs; allow threshold tolerances.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Reserved/spot instance portfolio strategy","description":"Blend RIs/Savings Plans with spot for optimal coverage & risk.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Tiered pricing scenarios & tests","description":"Design rating pipeline for tiered/usage-based models with fixtures.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Reference repos and templates publication","description":"Publish golden repos for common stacks; keep updated via bots.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"3DS challenge flow & exemptions","description":"Support SCA exemptions and seamless challenge UX.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Test data management & fixtures library","description":"Deterministic data, factories, and anonymized snapshots for tests.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Merge duplicate test flows & remove flakes","description":"Consolidate similar specs, stabilize network waits and timeouts.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Synthetic monitoring for critical journeys","description":"Run smoke scenarios hourly; alert on SLA breaches.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Cost allocation tags & showback reports","description":"Enforce tagging; monthly showback to business owners.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Pre-commit hooks rollout","description":"Enable style/security checks; enforce contributor guidelines.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Exception handling & refund workflows","description":"Design fault-tolerant flows for declines, chargebacks, and refunds.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Curate prep materials & vouchers","description":"Provide courseware, practice tests, and exam vouchers.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"License optimization & consolidation","description":"Eliminate unused seats; consolidate vendor contracts for volume.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"MFA rollout & device checks","description":"Enforce MFA and device compliance across org apps; phased rollout.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Outreach schedule & brochures","description":"Finalize target colleges and share hiring collateral.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Online test vendor onboarding & pilot","description":"Finalize SLAs; pilot with 200 candidates across 3 colleges.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Offer letters & comp approvals","description":"Generate offers, route for approvals, and e-signature workflows.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Onboarding schedule & IT provisioning","description":"Plan induction; trigger SSO/email/laptop provisioning requests.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Offer acceptance tracking & risk coverage","description":"Track acceptances, drop-offs; maintain backup candidate pool.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Day-1 experience & feedback loop","description":"Welcome kit, induction, and feedback capture for continuous improvement.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Survey design & rollout","description":"Design questionnaire; coordinate communications and launch windows.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Standard devcontainer.json templates","description":"VS Code, ports, and extension packs for common stacks.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Pipeline gating on severity thresholds","description":"Fail builds on HIGH+ vulns; auto-create remediation tickets.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Interview panel readiness & scheduling","description":"Train panels, calibrate rubrics, and auto-schedule slots.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Buddy allocation & training enrollment","description":"Assign buddies and enroll new hires to mandatory training tracks.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Pre-joining engagement & FAQs","description":"Regular touchpoints; address queries on relocation, HR policies.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Employer branding & campus talks","description":"Prepare decks, alumni connects, and Thought Leadership sessions.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Background checks & document collection","description":"Initiate BG checks and collect KYC, education, and experience proofs.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Attendance sync & reconciliation","description":"Ensure time entries sync to payroll with zero drift.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"P&L variance deep-dive","description":"Explain deviations vs budget and prior period across business lines.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Accrual entries & reconciliations","description":"Book accruals and reconcile control accounts for key balances.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Rightsize compute/storage tiers","description":"Tune instance types, autoscaling thresholds, and storage classes.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"PCI gap analysis & compensating controls","description":"Scope reduction via tokenization and network segmentation.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Data transfer and egress optimization","description":"Reduce cross-region chatter; use CDNs/peering where applicable.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Idempotency & reconciliation","description":"Ensure safe retries and ledger alignment for settlements.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Idle resource cleanup","description":"Identify and decommission unused VMs/volumes to cut costs.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"KPI dashboard for cost & utilization trends","description":"Publish monthly cost per product, per environment KPIs.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Patch baseline across fleets","description":"Automate monthly patch windows for OS/runtime fleets.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"Patch compliance dashboard & alerts","description":"Real-time compliance posture and breach alerts for fleets.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Secrets rotation & key management SOPs","description":"Define rotation cadence; integrate with secret managers/PKI.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Vulnerability scanning integration (OS/containers)","description":"Schedule scans, dedupe findings, and route to owners automatically.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"OS/DB patch runbooks & rollback validation","description":"Standardize patch SOPs and automated rollback tests in lower envs.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"Micro-segmentation policies & firewalls","description":"Define app tiers and east-west ACLs with zero-trust defaults.","status":"COMPLETED"}
{"title":"CIS hardening for Linux/Windows baselines","description":"Apply CIS Level-1 settings; validate with automated scans.","status":"IN_PROGRESS"}
{"title":"Baseline images hardening & drift control","description":"Bake hardened base images; detect and remediate config drift.","status":"PLANNED"}
{"title":"WAF rules & DDoS protections","description":"Harden edge; configure rate limits, bot challenges, and WAF rulesets.","status":"PLANNED"}
